title: The Varieties of Religious Experience
author: William James
description: "The Varieties of Religious Experience is a generous and endlessly insightful book about human nature." — The New York Times "The most notable of all books in the field of the psychology of religion and probably destined to be the most influential book written on religion in the 20th century." — Psychology today Published in 1902 and quickly established itself as a classic, this book is a work that opens a new era of thinking.
